name: Google Drive Invoice Summary Email Agent — captured from live agent
description: Reverse-engineered from live agent 6ef48513-f49c-4635-b0dc-bdd9bf2f80a6 (created 2026-06-02). Reads invoice files from a Google Drive folder, downloads each file's bytes, extracts invoice fields per file via the document-extractor plugin inside a scatter_gather loop, computes roll-up aggregates, and emails an HTML summary table via Gmail (with an empty-folder branch). UPDATED 2026-06-16 (WP-57 fix): the snapshot was regenerated and now compiles the full extractor path — `list_files → filter → conditional[ scatter: download_file → document-extractor → with_fields, aggregates, ai/generate, send_email ]`. The earlier capture (2026-06-09) routed extraction to `ai_processing` because there was no base64 byte source; WP-57 (google-drive.download_file + compiler auto-insert + firmed §6.4 nudge) fixed that, so document-extractor is now bound. Captured headless via tests/v6-regression/scripts/capture-scenario-from-agent.ts (mirrors /api/v6/generate-ir-intent-contract Phases 0-4). Phase 1 is non-deterministic.

status.compile: PASS — regenerated 2026-06-15 (full extractor path: download_file → document-extractor, conditional empty-folder branch).
status.phase_a: PASS — verified 2026-06-15 (execution simulator, 14/14 checks, 0 errors, 0 warnings).
status.phase_d: PASS — verified 2026-06-15 (mocked WorkflowPilot, 12/12 steps, 0 failed; execution_metrics FK noise is the mock agent id only).
status.phase_e: PASS — verified 2026-06-15 (LIVE on agent 6ef48513). 13/13 steps, real email received; folder routing (WP-57 2B) + Textract extraction of 4 files incl. a PNG verified.
status.phase_e_caveat: Email is complete but document-extractor field quality is imperfect in deterministic mode (tax_amount/due_date/invoice_number mis-parsed — tracked as WP-59); the LLM summarizer smooths it. Multi-input AI wiring gap tracked as WP-58 (benign — runtime config scope + LLM re-derivation compensate).

exercises: document-extractor selection (WP-57): IC emits document/extract_structured_data and the compiler now binds it to the document-extractor plugin, auto-inserting google-drive.download_file to supply base64 bytes (plugins_used = google-drive, document-extractor, google-mail)
scatter_gather per-file extraction loop over Google Drive files
aggregate roll-up totals (sum of invoice amounts) feeding an HTML summary email
Contrast with contracts-googledocs-v2ui-pipeline-a (Google Docs content read + internal AI date extraction)
known_weaknesses: Phase 1 LLM emission is non-deterministic; a re-run may emit a different IC (e.g. bind the extract step to document-extractor, or change step count). Reproduction of this exact snapshot is not guaranteed.

Agent's IntentContract / data_schema are NOT persisted on the agents row (agent_config has only ai_context + creation_metadata), so this snapshot was regenerated via a fresh LLM run rather than read back from the agent.
